description: Skill Builder agent contract regressions via OpenCode.
prompts:
Skill Builder agent contract regression scenario: {{scenario}}.

Use the repository files and agent instructions to evaluate this Skill Builder behavior. Return JSON only with this shape: {"scenario": "{{scenario}}", "ok": boolean, "failures": string[]}. Set ok to true only when the scenario satisfies the durable product contract.

assert.value: const parsed = JSON.parse(output); parsed.ok === true && parsed.scenario === context.vars.scenario && Array.isArray(parsed.failures) && parsed.failures.length === 0
